title: game_load – input
description: Loads a .cos save by fileName or saveGuid from the configured MCP saves folder. Provide exactly one of fileName or saveGuid.

fileName.description: Save file name only, for example: savegame_11.cos. Mutually exclusive with saveGuid.

saveGuid.description: Stable save GUID as returned by game_list_saves. Scans all .cos files in the saves folder. Mutually exclusive with fileName.
